title: unify chat_delta_sync fallback-to-full-load paths
description: chat_delta_sync has two structurally identical fallback blocks (empty-state at line 610 and has_more_changes at line 639): both call load_chats, map Ok to Some(state), and map Err to send_event+None. The only variation is the error message string. A reader must diff both blocks to confirm they are the same logic. — Extract a private async helper, e.g. async fn full_reload(client, api_url, account_id, tx, ctx, err_label: &str) -> Option<String>, and replace both blocks with a single call site each, passing the appropriate err_label.
